title: AI Post-Apocalyptic
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into a cinematic survivor portrait.
positive_prompt: Post-apocalyptic survivor portrait, abandoned city ruins, cinematic dystopian atmosphere, realistic weathered clothing, dramatic lighting, survival adventure, detailed environment, dust and atmospheric particles, resilient expression, photorealistic skin texture, movie-quality scene, ultra realistic, highly detailed, epic storytelling composition, sharp focus
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, low quality, blurry, extra limbs, extra fingers, deformed face, bad anatomy, duplicate features, watermark, logo, text, excessive gore, blood, zombies, dismemberment, unrealistic proportions, overexposed, underexposed, noise, artifacts, cropped body
